description: Style Note Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wish-list this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Product Details Black wallet that has a flap with one main compartment Three card holders and two insert pockets on one side Five card holders, one transparent id card holder and two insert pockets with a press buttoned closure on the other side Branding embossed on the front Material and Care Synthetic Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt Size 12 cm x 9.5 cm
